hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]]|;|&&|\|\|)cd[[:space:]]+/Users/liamj/Documents/development/knowledge-hub'; then echo 'BLOCKED: bash command contains cd to /Users/liamj/Documents/development/knowledge-hub*. This is the worktree-isolation leak vector per CLAUDE.md Worktree isolation rules — sub-agents that cd to the main worktree leak commits to the wrong branch. Drop the cd prefix; use relative paths from your CWD (which is already the worktree).' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+-C[[:space:]]+/Users/liamj/Documents/development/knowledge-hub'; then echo 'BLOCKED: bash command uses git -C with an absolute knowledge-hub path. This is the worktree-isolation leak vector — sub-agents must run git from their worktree CWD, not via -C to the main repo.' >&2; exit 2; fi
